generated_oml:
instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for energy consumption metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
]

instance NonVisualHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for non-visual health effects metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance VisualComfortDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

instance NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NonVisualHealthSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for energy consumption metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance VisualComfortData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance NonVisualHealthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for non-visual health effects metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHonoConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration for Eclipse Hono IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EclipseDittoConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration for Eclipse Ditto digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime metadata for devices (sensors, actuators, controllers)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTool, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems for controlling lighting systems"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems for controlling HVAC systems"
]

instance BIMModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModularServiceExtensionsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, SimulationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthService, ModularServiceExtensionsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, LightAdjustmentAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthInsight, AirQualityAdjustmentAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ModularServiceExtensionsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service extensions for facility management and operational decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalPlanningAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy usage based on real-time data and historical trends"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort metrics for occupant satisfaction"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics related to non-visual health effects such as air quality and lighting impacts"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational status of building systems from sensor data"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from building simulation scenarios"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visual representations of building data"
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting building system parameters based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperationalPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Planning maintenance and operational schedules based on predictive insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting lighting parameters for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AirQualityAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting HVAC parameters for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "AECO building infrastructure represented as a Digital Twin for a Living Lab case study"
    base:contains EnergyConsumptionSensor, VisualComfortSensor, NonVisualHealthSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, BIMModel, EclipseHonoConfig, EclipseDittoConfig, BIMModelingTool, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineering, RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortService, NonVisualHealthService, InteractiveVisualizationService, ModularServiceExtensionsService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for actuation of physical devices, including adaptive lighting adjustments and HVAC optimizations based on digital twin analytics."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates from physical sensors, enabling live synchronization between physical assets and digital twins for operational decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated integration of BIM models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular service extensions within a unified framework for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages: design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with unified virtual representations enabling optimization across the complete asset lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual representations, ensuring semantic coherence and interoperability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, enabling bidirectional communication through standardized protocols for real-time data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC), standardized extension points for service integration, and ODTE metric for interoperability assessment across heterogeneous systems."
]
